china-compliance.description: Chinese advertising law compliance, AI search visibility, and cross-border data compliance tools

tools.name: check_compliance
tools.description: Check text for Chinese advertising law violations and platform-specific banned words. Returns risk-level classification with safe replacement suggestions.

text.description: Text content to check for violations

tools.name: audit_geo_visibility
tools.description: Audit brand visibility in Chinese AI search engines (DeepSeek, Kimi, 豆包, 通义千问, 文心一言). Returns citation rates, sentiment, and optimization suggestions.

brand.description: Brand or product name to audit

keywords.description: Industry keywords to check visibility for

tools.name: assess_data_export
tools.description: Assess cross-border data transfer compliance against PIPL (China), GDPR (EU), and CCPA (US). Returns risk assessment and required actions.

description.description: Description of the application and its data flows
